title: Create: Shalz Elytra Recipe
description: Elytra recipe as seen in Shalz's One Block series
body:
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03fea9b9dbfefaf2ee890ba4bfe799a5c53d092d.png)

**This project is a datapack at its core**

Feel free to use the mod version, but it is easier to install the datapack

### Recipe is as shown in [Shalz's One Block series on episode 1](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RNn-XEJYvb0)

_AKA: Deploying a netherite ingot on a piece of paper yields an elytra_

If you find any issues, please send a discord message to @samadc
